extension.description: Professional development tools for TyranoScript / TyranoBuilder: debugger, analyzer, flow graph, auto-test, profiler, and more.
config.title: TyranoCode
config.projectRoot.description: Path to the TyranoScript project root (containing data/ and tyrano/ directories). Auto-detected if empty.
config.diagnostics.undefinedLabel: Warn on jump/call to undefined labels.
config.diagnostics.undefinedMacro: Warn on usage of undefined macros.
config.diagnostics.missingResource: Warn on references to missing resource files (images, audio, etc.).
config.diagnostics.unusedLabel: Warn on labels that are never referenced.
config.diagnostics.unreachableCode: Warn on code after unconditional jump/return.
config.license.key.description: License key for TyranoCode Pro features (debugger, flow graph, auto-test, profiler, refactoring).
config.license.key.markdownDescription: License key for **TyranoCode Pro** features. [Purchase on Gumroad](https://tyranocode.gumroad.com/)
debugger.label: TyranoScript Debugger
debugger.snippet.label: TyranoScript: Launch
debugger.snippet.description: Launch TyranoScript game with debugger attached
